title: 🚨🔴⚫️ AC Milan proceed in talks to find new manager and despite reports, nothi...

blocks.content: 🚨🔴⚫️ AC Milan proceed in talks to find new manager and despite reports, nothing close or done with Oliver Glasner yet.Matthias Jaissle and Rúben Amorim are in the running as options to become new head coach.🎥🇮🇹 https://t.co/TEfOurXqc0 https://t.co/JGP09ULcEV — Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) Jun 11, 2026
